pageContext.name: Jurassic Park Logo Mini Backpack
pageContext.description: Introducing Jurassic Park Logo Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features an enameled zipper charm, applique, embroidered, debossed, and printed details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Jurassic Park Logo Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
